titleStmt.title: SII 36.217: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 217. (A.R. No. 217 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Makara, śu., 4, Sunday, Uttiraṭṭādi = A.D. 1253, January 5, Sunday.)

Records an inventoy of gold and silver ornaments received by the four officials of the temple of Tiruvallidāyam in Ambattūr-nāḍu of Puḻalkōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The ornaments were presented to the image Tiruvīdi Nāchchiyār and also to the presiding deity of the temple by Chōḻappiḷḷaiyār Nāchchiyār, a dēvaraḍiyāḷ of the temple of Tiruvēgambamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Kāñchīpuram. The above image was installed by Chōḻappiḷḷaiyār Nāchchiyār in memory of her mother Thaṅkachchiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vijayakaṇṭakopālatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturtiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Eyiṟ ko
ṭṭattu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil yakap perunteruvil tevaraṭiyāril taṅkacciyār makaḷār coḻappiḷḷaiyār nācciyāreṉ Immaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu vampattūr nāṭṭu tiru
mātoṭuṟaikiṉṟa Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku taṅkacciyār tāyār nampiyāḻvār nācciyār peyarāl Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruvīti nācciyāṟkkum Uṭaiyāṟkkum cāttiṉa tiruvāparaṇaṅkaḷ paṭṭam Oṉṟuṉāl poṉ Irukaḻañce mukkālum tiruviḷampiṟai
poṉ kaḻañcum Uṭpuṟattu Iṭṭa veḷḷi kaḻañcu nācciyārkku cāttiṉa tirumaṅkali nāṇ kaḻañcum tiricaram Oṉṟiṉāl pata muttu Eṭṭum Itiṉ kīḻttaram muttu Aññūṟṟu Irupattu Eṭṭum poṉmaṇi Iraṇṭum niṇṭāyap pa
vaḻam patiṉmūṉṟu kuṇṭaip pavaḻam nāṟpatum Āka Eṇpatalāṉa Iṭai patiṉ kaḻañcarai parikalam 1 ṉāl Iṭai 3 10m tiruvālattaṭṭi 1 ṉāl Iṭai 6 10m taṇṇīr Amutu vaṭṭil 1 ṉāl Iṭai 5 m caṅ
kum caṅkiṟ kālum tirumuttuvāḷi Iraṇṭuṉāl muttup patiṉāṟu Itukku (itukku) Iṭṭa kāmpum kalum Uṭpaṭa Oṉpatu māṟṟup poṉ kaḻañcum tiruppaḷḷiaṟai nācciyāṟkum tiruvīti nācciyāṟku
m tirukkāṟcarikku Iṭṭa veḷḷi Irupatiṉ kaḻañcu Uṭaiyāṟkuc cāttiṉa keṅkā tevi nācciyāṟku veḷḷi Eḻukaḻañcu Ikkoyil tevaraṭiyāril poṉṉāṇṭai Iṭṭa paṭṭam 1 ṉāl poṉ Eṇkaḻañcu māṟṟu
Oṉpatum Ivai Ittaṉaiyum kaikkoṇṭom bhāradvāji nāṟpat
teṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉum Aḻakañāṉacampanta paṭṭaṉum kāśyapaṉ tirucciṟṟampala
paṭṭaṉum kulottuṅka paṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
